_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in processing digital evidence, to include protecting and making legally sound copies of evidence.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control narratives, policy documentation, audit trails, and supporting artifacts that demonstrate compliance to examiner standards.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-004 (RC, cosine: 0.493), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.520). Shared vocabulary: [evidence, skill]. DCWF-only terms [copies, digital, include, legally, making, processing] vs WIDAI-only terms [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.896, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:75.0%, C:24.9%). No dominant classification for "Skill in processing digital evidence, to include protecting and making legally s" vs "Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control n" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.578 > STS 0.520 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [evidence, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.6%. Shared tokens: [evidence, skill]. DCWF-only: [copies, digital, include, legally, making, processing]. WIDAI-only: [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, documentation].

signals.detail: STS 0.520 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
